epigraph.quote: Simon practised cricket with Charles, while Eve walked Tonic to a barn where he chased rabbits. A lovely evening.

per_stop.quote: Large trees. An orange-haired man had an orange tent next door, & there were bird-spotters in another tent.
Church with a round tower. Very very pretty countryside.
We are sitting in almost sun on the balcony. Tonic likes the balcony lovely gardens.
a field bordered by Willow + silver birch, + walks along straight raised paths
